suggestions.topic: EPBS DevNet-0 launch status and client readiness
suggestions.rationale: End of February deadline has passed; need confirmation on DevNet-0 status with Lighthouse, Teku, and Prysm. Critical blocker for Glamsterdam timeline.

suggestions.topic: EPBS deposit bug fix PR 4897 merge status
suggestions.rationale: Lido researchers identified DOS vulnerability; PR 4897 was flagged for merge before DevNet Zero launch. Needs confirmation of resolution.

suggestions.topic: EPBS fork choice complexity and OptimisticSync issues
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #173 to DevNet1; highly non-trivial invalid branch removal concerns flagged. Now approaching DevNet1 timeline.
Selected as Hegotá headliner with 8/11 clients having prototypes. Need status update on remaining clients and devnet planning.
ACDC #173 decided ePBS cannot ship without partial slot proofs in all clients. Teku, Lodestar, Nimbus completion status needs confirmation.
Backwards compatible optimization can deploy pre-Amsterdam. Lighthouse nearly done, Prism in review, Lodestar debugging. Discuss rollout timeline.
PR still open with ongoing discussion as of ACDC #175. Needs resolution for spec finalization.
ACDC #173 proposed June-August target maintaining two forks yearly. Contingent on ePBS DevNet progress.
